programs.title: Animal Fight Night
programs.desc: Nature's battle plans reveal how an intelligent attack can be the difference between victory and death.

programs.title: Animal Fight Night
programs.desc: The world's strongest, largest and deadliest creatures in the animal kingdom risk everything as they battle for food, territory and mating privileges.

programs.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories
programs.desc: In search of a steady supply of dog food, Becky and family establish a Fish Camp on Great Slave Lake; Kim and Pierre work on a new shelter; Bentley and new comer Jon Grenier attempt to secure essential sources of meat before winter sets in.

programs.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories
programs.desc: Becky and Dene make upgrades to their new homestead; Kim and Pierre look to the land for a source of emergency food; Bentley tries his hand at some early season trapping; Jon takes to the sea in his on-going quest to pad his winter larder.

programs.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories
programs.desc: Becky struggles to secure a steady supply of winter water; Kim and Pierre turn their attention to harvesting big game; Jon looks to the land for some much-needed supplies; Bentley cruises the waters of Schade Lake.

programs.title: Life Below Zero: Northern Territories
programs.desc: Kim and Pierre redouble their efforts to harvest a moose; Becky pushes herself to the limit for her dogs; Bentley and his father build a summer runway for their plane; Jon and his two sons look to the past to help them build for their future.
